The '''[[Tag Greenly|Tag]] and [[Bink Otauna/Legends|Bink]]''' series of comics comprises four issues and one short comic in ''[[Star Wars Tales]]''. The first three comic books cover a single movie in the [[original trilogy]] and the fourth covers the entire [[prequel trilogy]]. The [[The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition|Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition]] issue was the "special edition" of the short comic, [[The Revenge of Tag & Bink]]. All of the stories are explicitly [[Canon|non-canon]].

==Development==
The Tag & Bink series of comic books was created by [[Kevin Rubio]]. Following the success of Kevin's shorts that appeared in [[Star Wars Tales]], [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] and [[Lucasfilm]] commissioned Kevin to do a two-part original series, which became [[Tag & Bink Are Dead 1]] and [[Tag & Bink Are Dead 2]] (often referred to by Kevin as "Tag and Bink Live").

The stories themselves are comedic in nature and based in part on Tom Stoppard's ''Rosencrantz & Guildenstern Are Dead'' - an award winning play that centers around the lives of two minor characters in [[Wikipedia:William Shakespeare|William Shakespeare's]] [[Wikipedia:Hamlet|''Hamlet'']]. But in the case of Tag and Bink, we follow two hapless rebels in the Star Wars universe, as they cross paths with every major character, in both the original and new trilogy.

Despite the limited number of issues, Tag and Bink have achieved a cult status in the Star Wars universe. Some have reported the first issue of Tag and Bink has sold as high as $175.00 US in internet auctions, although this may be a hoax as recently ended auctions for these books show them at below cover price.
